Golden-god: Radiant gold, warm cream, rich amber, celestial deep-sky blue—divine light incarnate.
Blood-crimson: Deep crimson, oxblood shadow, ancient bronze, oil-slick black—battle and sacrifice palette.
Deep-violet underworld: Royal violet, moonlit silver, shadowed plum, abyssal black—realm of forgotten souls.
Dawn-peach heaven: Soft peach, rose-gold shimmer, warm cream, ethereal pale-blue—celestial awakening light.
Jade-and-turquoise: Lustrous jade, bright turquoise, imperial gold, ivory cream—sacred temple tranquility.
Sepia-ancient: Burnt umber earth, weathered tan, faded gold leaf, aged cream—time's patina revealed.
Olympus-marble: Pure white stone, Zeus-sky blue, divine gold accent, cloud cream—peak of gods.
Norse-ice: Frost silver, glacial ice-blue, pure white snow, warm amber fire—winter's harsh beauty.
Egyptian-royal: Pharaoh's gold, lapis lazuli blue, kohl-black liner, desert ochre—eternal dynasty power.
Hindu-divine: Sacred saffron, iridescent peacock, brilliant gold, vibrant crimson—cosmic energy manifestation.
Japanese-imperial: Ceremonial vermilion gates, pristine white silk, gilded chrysanthemum, deep indigo night—samurai honor eternal.
Chinese-jade-palace: Emperor's jade throne, lustrous gold dragons, festival red lanterns, porcelain cream—dynasty splendor.
Aztec-temple: Volcanic obsidian blades, sacred turquoise mosaic, ritual jade mask, solar gold—sacrificial grandeur.
Celtic-forest: Deep emerald canopy, druidic gold torques, weathered bronze shields, mystical shadow-green—ancient grove magic.
Underworld-stygian: Styx violet mist, ghost grey stone, endless black void, spectral green phosphor—realm beyond death.
Polynesian-sunset: Vibrant coral reef, tropical turquoise wave, molten gold horizon, shell cream—island paradise transcendent.
Ragnarok: Apocalyptic fire-orange blaze, Jotunheim ice-blue, void black chaos, spilled blood—world's ending prophesied.
Armageddon-cosmic: Infinite indigo expanse, supernova gold burst, angelic flame-red, ash-grey ruin—final celestial war.
Titan-fall: Defeated sunset-gold, vengeful storm-grey, titan blood rivers, shattered bronze—gods overthrown majestically.
Death-goddess: Spilled crimson sacrifice, tomb black depths, faint gold divinity, skeletal bone-white—mortality's dark queen.
African-orisha: Sun-baked ochre clay, midnight indigo rivers, spirit white lightning, warrior red earth—ancestral divine power.
Slavic-birch: Pale silver-birch bark, honeyed amber resin, soft cream linen, kokoshnik red crown—forest maiden enchantment.
Mesopotamian-cuneiform: Ancient clay-tan tablets, hammered bronze gates, starlit indigo heavens, limestone cream—civilization's first written gods.
Native-American-turquoise: Sacred turquoise stone, canyon rust earth, buffalo bone cream, obsidian black—great spirit presence.
Inuit-aurora: Dancing green-purple lights, silver-ice tundra, snow white expanse, midnight blue—northern sky spirits singing.
Mayan-royal-jade: Sacred jade-green ceremonial, solar gold pyramid, festival red banners, sacrificial blood—jungle king divinity.
Cosmic-dance: Shiva's blue throat, Kali's red tongue, Brahma's golden lotus, Krishna's peacock—universe in eternal motion.
Hero-journey: Courage amber glow, trial shadow depths, triumph golden-highlight, destiny bronze—transformation through ordeal complete.
Elysian-meadow: Asphodel-white flowers eternal, hero's gold laurel, blessed pale-blue sky, honey cream—paradise for worthy souls.
Creation-dawn: First rose-gold light breaking, primordial cream mist, newborn pale-blue, scattered gold-dust stars—universe birthed anew.
Slavic-rushnik: Embroidered-red geometric patterns, sacred cream linen, protective black borders, ancestral bronze threads—folk blessing woven.
Olympus-marble: Marble white columns gleaming, thunder blue heavens, laurel gold wreaths, nectar cream clouds—immortal summit.
Norse-ice: Silver frost runes carved, frozen ice-blue fjords, blizzard white storms, mead amber halls—Valhalla's frozen glory.
Egyptian-royal: Ankh gold eternal, deep lapis-blue Nile, kohl-black cosmetic liner, papyrus ochre scrolls—pharaoh's timeless reign.
Hindu-divine: Turmeric saffron blessings, jeweled peacock feathers iridescent, temple gold offerings, goddess crimson silk—chakra power unleashed.
Japanese-imperial: Torii vermilion gateway sacred, paper white shoji screens, emperor's gold seal, midnight indigo kimono—bushido spirit embodied.
Chinese-jade-palace: Imperial jade seal carved, dragon gold embroidery, lucky red silk banners, moon cream porcelain—Forbidden City grandeur.
Aztec-temple: Obsidian knife edge sharp, turquoise serpent mosaic gleaming, jade death mask eternal, sun gold disk—Quetzalcoatl's pyramid rising.
Celtic-forest: Emerald oak leaves ancient, gold Celtic knot spirals, bronze cauldron magic, shadow-green mist veiling—Avalon's hidden threshold.
Underworld-stygian: River Styx violet flowing, tombstone grey silence, Hades' black throne absolute, ghost-green flame flickering—souls judged eternally.
Underworld-descent: Twilight violet fading, charcoal grey deepening, obsidian black depths, phantom silver veins—soul's downward spiral.
African-orisha: Terracotta ochre drums beating, sacred indigo cloth flowing, kaolin white masks gleaming, blood red offerings—deity possession.
Slavic-birch: Moonlit silver-birch forests whispering, pine amber resin gleaming, butter cream embroidery, maiden red berry crown—fairy tale.
Mesopotamian-cuneiform: Ziggurat clay-tan bricks stacked, temple bronze doors towering, cosmic indigo star-charts, alabaster cream offerings—Gilgamesh's epic.
Native-American-turquoise: Sky turquoise beadwork sacred, desert rust sandstone carved, buckskin cream leather soft, raven black feathers—vision quest.
Inuit-aurora: Celestial green-purple ribbons dancing, glacier silver-ice cracking, polar white silence, ocean midnight depths—shaman's sky realm.
Mayan-royal-jade: Jungle jade-green mask carved, pyramid gold capstone gleaming, ceremonial red cacao, king's blood sacrifice—divine rulership.
Cosmic-dance: Rainbow multi-color chakras spinning, starlight silver threads connecting, void black matrix, creation gold sparks—Nataraja's universe rhythm.
Hero-journey: Dawn amber hope rising, abyss shadow testing, victory golden-highlight crowning, tempered bronze weapon forged—mythic transformation arc.
Elysian-meadow: Eternal asphodel-white blooms nodding, champion's gold armor resting, paradise pale-blue streams flowing, sunlit honey cream—heroes' blessed rest.
